capabilities.name: Policy limits/category rules
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-06. Skill: manage_expense_policy upsert live over gateway (baseline '*' cap 50000/receipt/approval>20000 → policy_id). UI: Policies tab in ExpensesPage + useExpensePolicies hook (list/upsert/delete, cap/receipt/approval-threshold). evaluate_expense_policy consumer verified 2026-06-14.
capabilities.notes: Backend verified 2026-06-14; admin UI built + Stage-3 live 2026-07-06.

capabilities.name: Mileage/per-diem rate tables
capabilities.verify: expense_rate_tables seeded with Skatteverket 2025 tax-free rates (mileage 25 kr/mil = 7331, per-diem full 290 kr / half 145 kr / night 145 kr = 7321). Admin UI: Rates tab in ExpensesPage. AddExpenseDialog has Mileage/Per-diem modes that auto-compute amount = quantity × active rate. Effective-dated (valid_from) + versioning + archive. get_expense_rate(code, date) helper returns the active version.

capabilities.name: Approval delegation
capabilities.verify: approval_delegations table (from_user, to_user, starts_at, ends_at) with helper manage_approval_delegation RPC. Admin UI: Delegations tab in ExpensesPage — create/revoke with date range. Active window derived from starts_at/ends_at. Used by approval routing across all approval chains, not just expenses.

capabilities.name: Bulk approve/reject
capabilities.verify: ExpenseReportsTab has checkbox multi-select on submitted reports plus an action bar with Approve selected (loops approve_expense_report RPC) and Reject selected (batch UPDATE to rejected status with reason prompt). Single-row Reject also added.
